title: 'Economic Fury' on Iran: US seizes Tehran's biggest crypto network amid peace talks
summary_full: The US has imposed sanctions on Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, Nobitex, and its executives, accusing them of aiding the Iranian government and sanctioned entities in bypassing Western restrictions. This move, dubbed 'Economic Fury,' aims to increase economic pressure on Tehran amid ongoing conflicts.
